title: Naan Romba Romba lyrics Siruthai Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer : Ranjith, Chorus
Song : Naan Romba Romba

Jintha-tha jintha jintha jintha tha tha
Jintha-tha jintha jintha jintha tha tha

Naan Romba Romba Nalla pilla illa
Romba nalla pilla-kellam nan chella pilla illa
Naan Romba Romba Nalla pilla illa

friend-ellam poriki pulla
echikala thirutu pulla
engaluku oorum illa
permananent-u perum illa
thatiketka aalum illa
dav-vadika neram illa
sondham endru yaarum illa
sentiment-u yedhum illa

Raja Raja nan Rock Raja
ye raja raja rocket raja

Naan Romba Romba Nalla pilla illa
Romba nalla pilla-kellam nan chella pilla illa

5-am class-u padikum podhu, aataya potavan
6-am class-u padikum podhu blade potavan
head master bike-a thirudi edaiku potavan
nan central jail-il 100 thadava tent-tu potavan

emaandha emaathu, envela vammaathu
solvadhellam suthamaana poi
vakkiradhelam pocket-tula kai
paraangallil kooda eduthiduven nan neyi neyi

Raja Raja nan Rock Raja
ye raja raja rocket raja

Naan Romba Romba Nalla pilla illa
Romba nalla pilla-kellam nan chella pilla illa

Kambi enni kambi enni kanaku padichavan
Nan 4 vayasil nambiyaara pola suttavan
Vanji kota vaaliban-ah vazha nenchavan
nan pinjulaye palluthavan-nu peru eduthavan

En rootu thani rootu, En bettu adhu vettu
solvadhellam suthamaana poi
vakkiradhelam pocket-tula kai
paraangallil kooda eduthiduven nan neyi neyi

Raja Raja ne Rock Raja
ye raja raja rocket raja

seo.keywords: Na Muthukumar, Siruthai, Vidyasagar, Ranjith, Naan Romba Romba full lyrics, Siruthai songs lyrics, Naan Romba Romba lyrics snippets, Naan Romba Romba WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Naan Romba Romba lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Naan Romba Romba?

The song Naan Romba Romba conveys a playful and energetic vibe, celebrating friendship and fun.

What is the context of this song in the movie Siruthai?

In Siruthai, this song highlights the carefree and lively moments among friends, adding to the film's overall entertainment.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Ranjith and composed by Vidyasagar.

When was Naan Romba Romba released?

Naan Romba Romba was released on January 3, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Romba Romba, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song encapsulates the spirit of friendship and fun, making it a perfect anthem for parties and gatherings. Ranjith's energetic performance, combined with Vidyasagar's vibrant composition, evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This track is a delightful addition to the soundtrack of Siruthai, resonating with audiences who enjoy upbeat and peppy music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Romba Romba from Siruthai is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Ranjith's vibrant vocals and Vidyasagar's catchy composition, this song is bound to get you on your feet. Dive into the infectious energy of this dance number that showcases the fun side of Tamil cinema!
stanzaMeanings: Jintha-tha jintha jintha jintha tha tha Jintha-tha jintha jintha jintha tha tha
I am really, really good. Not just good, but really good. I am not a bad person. I am really, really good. Not just good, but really good. I am not a bad person.
Friends are like thieves, we don't have a permanent place. There is no one to take care of us, no time for fun, no one to share feelings, and no sentiment at all.
King, King, I am Rock King, yes King, King, Rocket King.
I am really, really good. Not just good, but really good. I am not a bad person. I am really, really good. Not just good, but really good. I am not a bad person.
When I was in 5th grade, I was a troublemaker. In 6th grade, I was a fighter. I stole the headmaster's bike and ended up in jail 100 times.
Whatever happens, I will take care of everything. I will take everything that is said as a lie and keep it in my pocket. I will take it all, I will take it all.
King, King, I am Rock King, yes King, King, Rocket King.
I am really, really good. Not just good, but really good. I am not a bad person. I am really, really good. Not just good, but really good. I am not a bad person.
If you think about it, I was like a kid who learned to count. At 4 years old, I was like a genius. I took the name of a troublemaker who was a bad boy.
My route is a unique route, my bet is that everything said is a lie. I will take everything that is said and keep it in my pocket. I will take it all, I will take it all.
King, King, you are Rock King, yes King, King, Rocket King.
I am really, really good. Not just good, but really good. I am not a bad person. I am really, really good. Not just good, but really good. I am not a bad person.
Friends are like thieves, we don't have a permanent place. There is no one to take care of us, no time for fun, no one to share feelings, and no sentiment at all.
King, King, okay, I am Rock King, yes King, King, yeah, Rocket King.
